response.justification: Candidate is a versatile full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems/compute platforms. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no cloud compute platform leadership experience. Core technical requirements are not met.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship focus
Some distributed/low-latency experience at Dunnhumby handling high request volumes
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, dojos, and courses
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement; only one short C/C++ role visible
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure leadership experience
No formal tech lead title or evidence of leading cloud/DevOps engineering teams

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra background
